news.t: IndexIQ To Transfer Exchange Listing of Leaders in Research & Development ETF Suite To Nasdaq
IndexIQ Introduces ETF Suite Focused on Leaders in Research & Development

holdings.infoBox: WRND is an equity ETF with a total of 208 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.44%, Alphabet at 7.28%, Apple at 6.51%, ASML Holding at 5.53%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.85%.

overview.description: The NYLI Global Equity R&D Leaders ETF (WRND) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYLI Global Equity R&D Leaders index. The fund tracks an index that seeks to provide exposure to global large- and mid-cap companies that have high research and development spending, and attractive future growth potential. WRND was launched on Feb 8, 2022 and is issued by New York Life Investments.
infoTable: NYLI Global Equity R&D Leaders Index

data.title: IndexIQ To Transfer Exchange Listing of Leaders in Research & Development ETF Suite To Nasdaq
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IndexIQ today announced plans to transfer listing of the Leaders in Research & Development ETF Suite from NYSE Arca to Nasdaq.

data.title: IndexIQ Introduces ETF Suite Focused on Leaders in Research & Development
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New IndexIQ ETFs are designed to provide exposure to companies positioned for future innovation and expansion through sustained investment in R&D.
